---
title: ""
format: html
---

```{=html}
<section class="hero-section content-section">
  <h1 class="hero-title">
    Your Research Deserves<br><em>Undivided Attention</em>
  </h1>
  <p class="hero-subtitle">
    Specialized remote support for <strong>University faculty</strong> and <strong>Researchers</strong>, so you spend
    less time on overhead and more time on the work that actually matters.
  </p>
  <div class="hero-actions">
    <a href="/contact.qmd" class="btn-primary-wd">Inquire About Availability</a>
    <a href="#services" class="btn-ghost-wd">See What I Do ↓</a>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="stats-bar">
  <div class="stat-item">
    <div class="stat-number">2+</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Years in Remote services</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-item">
    <div class="stat-number">20+</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Projects Completed</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-item">
    <div class="stat-number">4</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Primary Services</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-item">
    <div class="stat-number">100%</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Remote & Async</div>
  </div>
</div>

<section id="services" class="content-section">
  <div class="section-label">What do I Offer?</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">Services Built for Academics</h2>
  <p class="section-body">
    Our services are synchronized with the actual rhythm of academic life. From looming grant cycles to tight submission windows, we help you navigate competing priorities so you can focus on the work that matters.
  </p>
</section>
```

::::::: {.grid .service-grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
```{=html}
<div class="service-card card-light shape-1">
  <div class="service-card-top">
      <div class="service-card-header">
        <div class="service-icon-wrap">📄</div>
        <h3>Documentation &amp; Formatting</h3>
      </div>
  </div>
  <div class="service-card-bottom">
      <p>
        We deliver meticulous precision across every document type—from complex manuscript formatting and grant proposals to structured journal rebuttals and technical reports. Every project is refined to meet your exact style guidelines, guaranteed.
      </p>
      <div class="service-tags-container">
        <span class="service-tag">LaTex</span>
        <span class="service-tag">MS-Office</span>
        <span class="service-tag">Google workspace with AI</span>
      </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

```{=html}
<div class="service-card card-light shape-2">
  <div class="service-card-top">
      <div class="service-card-header">
        <div class="service-icon-wrap-1">💻</div>
        <h3>Research Coding</h3>
      </div>
  </div>
  <div class="service-card-bottom">
      <p>
        Spend less time debugging and more time discovering. I use AI-driven workflows to script analysis pipelines and build statistical models that are clean, documented, and ready for publication.
      </p>
      <div class="service-tags-container">
        <span class="service-tag">Python / Quarto</span>
        <span class="service-tag">Data Pipelines</span>
        <span class="service-tag">AI-Automation</span>
      </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

```{=html}
<div class="service-card card-light shape-2">
  <div class="service-card-top">
      <div class="service-card-header">
        <div class="service-icon-wrap-1">🎨</div>
        <h3>Academic Design</h3>
      </div>
  </div>
  <div class="service-card-bottom">
      <p>
        Turn your raw data into clear visual stories. Whether you need the mathematical precision of LaTeX Beamer, the versatility of PowerPoint, or the creative speed of AI-driven design, I deliver high-quality figures and slides ready for your next defense or journal submission.
      </p>
      <div class="service-tags-container">
        <span class="service-tag">Figures &amp; Charts</span>
        <span class="service-tag">Conference Slides</span>
        <span class="service-tag">Infographics</span>
      </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

```{=html}
<div class="service-card card-light shape-1">
  <div class="service-card-top">
      <div class="service-card-header">
        <div class="service-icon-wrap">⚙️</div>
        <h3>Workflow &amp; Admin</h3>
      </div>
  </div>
  <div class="service-card-bottom">
      <p>
        Stop managing logistics and start managing your lab. I organize your digital workspace, handle the friction of scheduling, and implement collaboration tools that keep your projects on track—giving you the headspace to focus on high-impact work.
      </p>
      <div class="service-tags-container">
        <span class="service-tag">Calendar Management</span>
        <span class="service-tag">Notion / Obsidian</span>
        <span class="service-tag">Lab Coordination</span>
      </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::
:::::::

```{=html}
<section class="process-section content-section">
  <div class="section-label">The Process</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">How We Work Together?</h2>
  <p class="section-body"> An intuitive process designed to integrate seamlessly with your workflow—not add to your workload </p>

  <div class="process-steps">

    <div class="process-step">
      <div class="step-num">1</div>
      <div class="step-content">
        <h4>Discovery Call</h4>
        <p>We meet for 20–30 minutes to identify your current bottlenecks and determine which tasks are most critical to your success.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="process-step">
      <div class="step-num">2</div>
      <div class="step-content">
        <h4>Scoped Proposal</h4>
        <p>We provide a clear, itemized proposal detailing deliverables, timelines, and pricing. No vague retainers—just a transparent roadmap.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="process-step">
      <div class="step-num">3</div>
      <div class="step-content">
        <h4>Async Execution</h4>
        <p>Work takes place in a shared workspace—using Notion, Drive, or your preferred tool. You receive regular updates without being pulled into unnecessary meetings.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="process-step">
      <div class="step-num">4</div>
      <div class="step-content">
        <h4>Review &amp; Iterate</h4>
        <p>We conduct structured feedback rounds until the final product meets your exact standards. Revisions are built into every engagement.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>
<div class="cta-banner content-section">
  <h2>Ready to Reclaim Your Time?</h2>
  <p>
    I maintain a small client roster to provide the deep-focus support your research deserves. Contact me today to reserve space for your upcoming submission or grant cycle.
  </p>
  <a href="/contact.qmd" class="btn-primary-wd">Inquire About Availability →</a>
</div>
```
